metadata.title: Organization — Remix
metadata.description: Remix is the flagship product of Remix Labs UG, a globally distributed, remote-first organization.

hero.title: Remix Labs
paragraphs: Remix is the flagship product of Remix Labs UG, a globally distributed, remote-first organization.
Our team works from various countries including France, Germany, India, Netherlands, Nigeria, South Korea, UK, and USA.
We collaborate with a partner org, Soundboard, a US 501(c)(3) charitable organization, to handle Web3 education and outreach programs that use the Remix platform.

openSourceSection.description: Join our community of builders collaborating to shape the future of Web3.
